canvas.dropHint: Drop game here to add to timeline

clearConfirm.title: Clear Timeline?
clearConfirm.message: This will remove all games and connections. This action cannot be undone.

welcome.title: Welcome to ZTI
welcome.content:
Zelda Timeline Interpreter lets you explore and create your own Zelda timeline theories.

This is the official Nintendo timeline. You can also create new canvases using the + tab above.

dragDrop.title: Drag & Drop Games
dragDrop.content:
Drag games from the left sidebar onto the canvas to add them to your timeline.

Connect games by dragging from one handle to another.

editing.title: Timeline Editing
editing.content:
Right-click edges to change branch type or add labels.
Right-click empty space to add event nodes.
Use the branch selector to set the color for new connections.

annotation.title: Annotation Mode
annotation.content:
Click 'Draw' in the toolbar to enter annotation mode.
Draw directly on the canvas to highlight or annotate.
Use the eraser to remove strokes.

officialTimeline.childSplit: Young Link returns to the past
